mnemonics: Sweet Kids Like Pizza Every Saturday
Try Every Single Key On Every Keyboard Every Second
keyPoints: Definition of Sequential Search: Searching for an element in a list by checking each element one by one.
Brute Force Algorithm: A naive approach to find a substring in a string by checking every possible substring.
Time Complexity of Sequential Search: O(n)
Time Complexity of Brute Force Algorithm: O(n*m)
Advantages of Sequential Search: Simple to implement, easy to understand.
Disadvantages of Sequential Search: Inefficient for large datasets.
Advantages of Brute Force Algorithm: Can be used for finding unique substrings.
Disadvantages of Brute Force Algorithm: Inefficient for large datasets.
